# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities privately using GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/imposter-project/imposter/security/advisories/new).

Please do not open public issues for security problems.

This is a community-maintained open source project. Reports are reviewed on a
best-effort basis, and we appreciate your patience while a fix is investigated.

## Supported versions

Only the latest release receives security fixes.

> Looking for guidance on securing your Imposter mocks (TLS, authentication)?
> See the [Security documentation](../docs/security.md).
